overview.description: The PGIM Laddered S&P 500 Buffer 12 ETF (BUFP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that holds a laddered portfolio of PGIM S&P 500 Buffer 12 ETFs. BUFP was launched on Jun 11, 2024 and is issued by PGIM.
